tournament.name: Regional Championship - Ultimate Guard European Magic Series - Fanfinity

decks.notes: The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. With a mix of spells and creatures that can generate card advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and take control of the game. Additionally, the deck includes mana-fixing lands to ensure consistent mana production for the various spells and abilities. Overall, the deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's strategy while establishing its own game plan to come out ahead in the end.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to outlast the opponent. By using cards like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation to draw into more resources, as well as cards like Inevitable Defeat and Flashback to deal with threats, the deck aims to establish dominance over the board. The mana base includes a variety of lands to ensure consistent access to all colors needed for the spells in the deck, allowing for flexibility in responses to different situations.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing counterspells, removal, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The creatures provide additional defense and can also be used for offense if needed. The mana base is designed to ensure consistency and allow for the colors required for the spells in the deck. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and eventually overwhelm them with a combination of controlling elements and powerful threats.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. It utilizes a mix of low-cost creatures and combat tricks to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and finish the game before the opponent can stabilize. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's aggressive strategy, allowing for consistent plays and smooth curve-outs. Overall, the deck's main goal is to win through fast and relentless aggression.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on card advantage, removal, and tempo control. The key strategy is to maintain board presence and card advantage through various card draw and tutor effects. By utilizing cards like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation, the deck can draw into key removal spells like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique to control the opponent's board. The inclusion of Gran-Gran and Firebending Lesson also allows for a flexible win condition through damage or burn spells. The deck also includes lands that provide flexibility and consistency in mana fixing.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and aggressive creatures while utilizing various spells and abilities to control the board and deal damage. The deck focuses on building up a strong board presence early on and maintaining pressure throughout the game. Cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off provide early aggression, while Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent offer additional ways to deal damage. The deck also includes cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand for card advantage and control options.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a fast and aggressive strategy using low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves. By ramping up mana quickly with cards like Icetill Explorer and Llanowar Elves, the player can bring out bigger threats like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to quickly end the game. Sazh's Chocobo and Esper Origins provide additional support and card advantage, while cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel help to protect key creatures and provide evasion. Ultimately, the goal is to flood the board with creatures and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using creatures like Badgermole Cub and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. The deck combines powerful creatures with combat tricks like Erode and Seam Rip to maintain board control and push damage through. The inclusion of cards like Gene Pollinator and Keen-Eyed Curator adds some extra versatility to the deck. The mana base is built to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of Forest, Abandoned Air Temple, Hushwood Verge, Temple Garden, Plains, and Ba Sing Se.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while gradually building up resources and gaining incremental advantages. The key to success lies in carefully managing resources, knowing when to be aggressive and when to hold back, and anticipating the opponent's moves. By efficiently controlling the board and card advantage, the deck can outlast the opponent and eventually secure victory through attrition.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying evasive creatures and using cheap spells to deal damage to the opponent, aiming to win the game quickly before the opponent can establish their board. It includes a mix of creatures with flying and unblockable abilities, along with burn spells to clear blockers or finish off the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and mana fixing to ensure a consistent flow of threats and answers. The mana base includes lands that can produce both blue and red mana, along with colorless fixing to support the deck's multicolor requirements.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly generate aggressive board presence through low-cost creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, while utilizing efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the game. Boomerang Basics and Flow State provide additional utility and card advantage, while Stormchaser's Talent boosts the power of the creatures. The deck also includes some protection and disruption with cards like Spell Pierce and Impractical Joke. The lands are designed to provide a balanced mana base for the red and blue spells in the deck.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents' strategies through a combination of counterspells, removal, and bounce effects. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide early board control, while cards like Opt and Prismari Charm offer card advantage and flexibility. Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique take care of threats, with Get Out and Impractical Joke bouncing problematic permanents. The deck also includes card draw and selection tools like Sleight of Hand and Flow State. Winternight Stories serves as a finisher while the mana base ensures consistent access to both blue and red mana sources.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on card advantage and removal to control the board while generating value through card draw. The deck includes a variety of spells such as Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique to deal with threats, along with Gran-Gran and Jeskai Revelation for card advantage. The goal is to outvalue the opponent and control the game until you can win with powerful finishers like Into the Flood Maw. The mana base is designed to support the three-color strategy with a mix of lands to ensure consistency in casting spells.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures such as Bloodghast, Hardened Academic, and Marauding Mako, along with powerful spells like Requiting Hex and Erode, the deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and control the pace of the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Cool but Rude and Carnage, Crimson Chaos further enhances the deck's offensive capabilities, making it a formidable force in one-on-one matchups.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of creature damage and spell effects to quickly overwhelm your opponent. It utilizes creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider to deal damage, while spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion provide additional control and damage options. The mana base is tailored for consistency and speed, allowing for a variety of aggressive plays early in the game. The aim is to apply pressure early and maintain momentum throughout the match to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cards that allow for graveyard manipulation and reanimation of powerful creatures, in order to create a strong combo strategy. By using cards such as Deceit and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to cheat out creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Steamcore Scholar early in the game. This is supported by disruptive spells like Duress and Winternight Stories to control the opponent's hand and board state. The mana base is designed to support the deck's black/blue color identity while providing necessary land types for consistency.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, card draw, and versatile control options to outmaneuver and disrupt opponents while maintaining card advantage. It includes a mix of low-cost removal spells and versatile spells like Consult the Star Charts and Prismari Charm to control the board and hand advantage. The inclusion of cards like Improvisation Capstone and Sanar, Unfinished Genius allows for additional value and potential win conditions. The deck aims to control the game's tempo and ultimately overpower opponents through strategic decision-making and consistent resource management.

This deck focuses on card draw, removal, and control elements to outlast the opponent and gain incremental advantages over time. It utilizes a combination of spells like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom to control the board, while also having access to powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation. By managing resources effectively and controlling the pace of the game, the deck aims to eventually overwhelm the opponent with card advantage and efficient spellcasting. The mana base includes a variety of dual lands to ensure consistent access to all the colors needed for spells and abilities.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced, aggressive playstyle using low-cost creatures and instant spells. By utilizing cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to maintain board control and deal damage quickly. The inclusion of various card draw spells and mana-fixing lands ensures consistency in the deck's aggressive strategy, while cards like Secret Identity and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional versatility and power to outpace the opponent.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence and deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. With a mix of low-cost creatures and spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of direct damage and creature aggression. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck can control the board and maintain pressure on the opponent. Combining card draw and card advantage with aggressive creatures, the deck aims to maintain tempo and force the opponent into a defensive position.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively control the board with low-cost creatures and efficient spells, while maintaining tempo with bounce effects and card draw. By utilizing cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to keep the pressure on the opponent and finish the game quickly. The inclusion of Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter helps to further disrupt the opponent's strategy, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand ensure consistency in drawing into the necessary threats and answers. Overall, this deck focuses on speed, efficiency, and control to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and efficiently using spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to clear the way for attacks. The deck also utilizes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your own creatures. The inclusion of cards like Secret Identity and Vibrant Outburst provide additional versatility and the ability to surprise the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to maintain a fast pace and keep the opponent on their heels while pushing for a quick victory.

The key concept of this deck is to use aggressive creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and versatile cards like Opt to control the board and keep up the pressure. The inclusion of cards like Octopus Form and Stormchaser's Talent allow for additional ways to push damage through and close out the game. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to all the necessary colors for spells and creatures.

The main deck of this Izzet Control archetype focuses on utilizing a combination of creature removal spells, counter spells, card draw, and board control to slow down the opponent's strategy while setting up for a win condition. The deck includes a mix of cheap instant spells like Opt, Burst Lightning, and Sleight of Hand to maintain card advantage and control the pace of the game. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide additional creature removal options, while Hearth Elemental offers a powerful threat that can help close out the game. The deck also includes a few unique spells like Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke to disrupt the opponent's plans and create opportunities for a win.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Bloodghast, Marauding Mako, and Iron-Shield Elf to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With cards like Practiced Offense and Cool but Rude to buff your creatures, you can deal significant damage early on. Additionally, cards like Requiting Hex and Erode allow you to control your opponent's board and maintain your aggressive momentum. The mana base includes a good mix of lands to ensure you have the right colors when needed. This deck aims to apply constant pressure and force the opponent to react defensively.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. By using efficient mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and powerful threats like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent. Additionally, cards like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve provide ways to protect and buff your creatures, ensuring they can sustain their assault. The deck also includes some utility lands and removal spells to help maintain control of the battlefield.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly amass a board of aggressive creatures and overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient attacks. By utilizing mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain a steady stream of threats. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help to pump up the creatures and increase their effectiveness in combat. The inclusion of removal spells like Royal Treatment and Escape Tunnel ensures that the deck can handle opposing threats while staying on the offensive.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with efficient creatures and enchantments like Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer. It utilizes mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to ramp into powerful threats like Icetill Explorer and Earthbender Ascension. The deck also includes cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Royal Treatment for combat tricks and protection. With a mix of creatures, enchantments, and lands that provide additional benefits, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and consistent aggression.

The main focus of this deck is to play creatures quickly and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. The deck utilizes efficient, low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves to quickly ramp up mana and establish a strong board presence. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help enhance the creatures' abilities and power. The inclusion of cards like Royal Treatment and Demolition Field provide additional support and removal options. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to swarm the opponent with a fast and relentless mono green aggro strategy.

The main idea behind this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy by utilizing low-cost, efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Pawpatch Recruit. Surrak, Elusive Hunter provides additional power and Gene Pollinator and Keen-Eyed Curator offer card advantage. Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Voice of Victory provide additional ways to close out the game. Erode and Seam Rip help control the board and disrupt your opponent's plans. The mana base is solid with a mix of lands to ensure smooth gameplay.

The main focus of the deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy and maintaining board presence. The deck utilizes powerful control spells like Requiting Hex and Bitter Triumph to remove threats, while also using cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to outvalue the opponent. Emeritus of Ideation and Wistfulness provide card advantage, while cards like Day of Black Sun and Deadly Cover-Up offer versatility in dealing with different threats. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to all necessary colors of mana to support the control strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful combo cards to quickly reanimate key creatures and overwhelm the opponent. The strategy involves using cards like Deceit and The Soul Stone to bring back powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation from the graveyard. Requiting Hex and Bitter Triumph help control the board while cards like Duress and Day of Black Sun disrupt the opponent's plans. The deck also includes various utility cards like Stock Up and Deadly Cover-Up to maintain card advantage and protect key combo pieces. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements for its powerful spells.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of board wipes, counterspells, and card advantage. The inclusion of powerful spells like Jeskai Revelation and Consult the Star Charts allows for card draw and selection, while Inevitable Defeat and Sear provide targeted removal. Tablet of Discovery helps to dig for key cards, while Stock Up replenishes resources. The mana base is carefully crafted to ensure consistent access to all the necessary colors for a well-rounded control strategy. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents and grind out wins through careful planning and resource management.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal, and countermagic. It uses cards like Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts to generate card advantage, while also having answers like Lightning Helix and Inevitable Defeat to deal with threats. The goal is to out-value the opponent through efficient card selection and control spells, eventually leading to a victory through attrition. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the various colors needed for the control cards in the deck.

This deck revolves around using various control spells and card draw to manipulate the game in your favor while also having access to powerful removal and burn spells. The goal is to outlast your opponent and slowly grind them down until you can overwhelm them with big spells like Jeskai Revelation or North Wind Avatar. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure you have access to all your colors and can play your spells on curve. Patience and careful decision-making are key to piloting this deck to victory.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on controlling the battlefield and quickly putting pressure on the opponent using evasive creatures like Momo and Sage of the Skies. Quantum Riddler and Starfield Shepherd provide additional support and protection for the creatures, while spells like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip offer removal and combat tricks. The deck also includes a mix of card draw and ramp options to ensure constant threats on the board. With a balance of aggression and control, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on early game aggression with efficient creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Quantum Riddler, supported by tempo plays like Springleaf Drum and Daydream. Starfield Shepherd and Sage of the Skies provide resilience and card advantage, while Erode and Seam Rip disrupt opponents' strategies. Cosmogrand Zenith and Emeritus of Ideation offer strong finishers. The mana base includes Floodfarm Verge and Multiversal Passage for consistent color fixing. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and control the board to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy using flying creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage. By utilizing cards like Momo, Friendly Flier and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and control the tempo of the game. The inclusion of cards like Springleaf Drum and Daydream allows for additional acceleration and card advantage. Overall, the deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between flying creatures and efficient spells to secure a victory in a Standard 1 vs 1 match.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on stalling the game with cards like Colorstorm Stallion and Molten-Core Maestro, while using Sanar, Unfinished Genius to generate card advantage. The deck includes plenty of removal and burn spells such as Burst Lightning and Ashling's Command to control the board. Tablet of Discovery helps find key cards, while Prismari Charm offers versatility. The deck also utilizes card draw with Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up. The mana base is designed to support the deck's control elements and ensure consistency in casting spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells. By using cards like Jeskai Revelation and Tablet of Discovery to draw cards, as well as spells like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique to remove threats, the player aims to outvalue their opponent and ultimately win the game. The deck also includes some versatile cards like Improvisation Capstone and Ral, Crackling Wit for added utility, making it a well-rounded control deck in the Izzet color combination.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to efficiently control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while drawing cards and generating value through various spells and abilities. By using a combination of removal spells, card draw effects, and powerful enchantments, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and establish control of the game. Additionally, the deck features a mix of lands that provide flexibility in casting spells and ensuring consistent mana sources. Overall, the deck strives to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory through resource management and strategic gameplay.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and board wipes. By utilizing the powerful Izzet color combination, this deck aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage and efficiently managing threats. The deck also includes various synergies and win conditions such as Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique to close out the game. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to dominate the game through control and outmaneuver the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Slickshot Show-Off to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. Utilizing cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand, as well as card draw from Opt and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to maintain pressure while controlling the board. Secret Identity provides protection for key creatures, while Vibrant Outburst and Prismari Charm offer versatile removal options. The mana base supports the fast-paced gameplay with a mix of lands that provide colored mana and Multiversal Passage for fixing.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly build up a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent with cheap spells and creatures. By efficiently using cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Stormchaser's Talent to control the board and deal damage, while also utilizing cards like Secret Identity and Vibrant Outburst to generate card advantage and tempo, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive nature of the deck and ensure smooth gameplay.

This deck focuses on using low-cost, evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Burst Lightning and Shock provide additional burn damage to control the board, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to dig for more threats. Boomerang Basics and Wild Ride offer tempo advantage and disruption, allowing the deck to maintain pressure on the opponent. Stormchaser's Talent provides additional reach and card advantage, while Secret Identity and Impractical Joke offer utility and surprise factor. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive threats and burn spells.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on using low-cost spells and creatures to aggressively control the board and deal damage quickly. By combining cards like Slickshot Show-Off, Burst Lightning, and Stormchaser's Talent with evasive creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Drake Hatcher, the deck can apply pressure early and maintain its tempo throughout the game. Additionally, having access to bounce effects like Boomerang Basics and Secret Identity allows the deck to disrupt the opponent's game plan and keep them on the back foot.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence and put pressure on the opponent with cheap, aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game with bounce spells and card draw while using efficient creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab to chip away at the opponent's life total. The inclusion of counterspells and versatile removal cards adds a layer of protection against the opponent's threats, allowing the deck to maintain its aggressive strategy while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to deal quick damage to the opponent. The key strategy involves playing multiple spells in a turn to trigger abilities and maximize damage output. Cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics can control the board while Sleight of Hand and Opt help with card draw and selection. The inclusion of color-changing lands like Roaring Furnace / Steaming Sauna and Stormcarved Coast provide versatility in mana fixing. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast-paced aggression and spell synergy.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly build up a board of aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, while utilizing efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board. The inclusion of versatile cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand allow for adaptability in different matchups, while Stormchaser's Talent and Colorstorm Stallion provide additional pressure. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its fast tempo and mix of direct damage and creature threats, utilizing the UR color combination to its fullest potential.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence with low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. Using a combination of aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Drake Hatcher, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. The deck also includes some control elements like Bounce Off and Vibrant Outburst to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of tempo and direct damage, this deck aims to win the game swiftly.

The key concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board with cheap and efficient spells, using cards like Burst Lightning and Opt to stay ahead in tempo. The deck also utilizes cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage with card draw spells like Sleight of Hand. The mana base is set up to ensure consistent and smooth gameplay, allowing for easy access to the necessary colors of mana to cast spells. Overall, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and control.

The deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy by using low-cost spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It utilizes cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal direct damage, while also using cards like Secret Identity and Slickshot Show-Off to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Drake Hatcher, while also maintaining card advantage and tempo with cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of low-cost spells and creatures to apply pressure early on in the game and maintain control of the board. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total while keeping the battlefield clear with cards like Boomerang Basics and Eddymurk Crab. The deck's mana base is set up to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of Islands and red sources, ensuring consistent access to the spells needed to overwhelm the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's plays through a combination of counter spells, removal, and disruptive creatures. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while advancing its own through card selection and incremental advantage. The deck uses cards like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock to disrupt the opponent's board state, while utilizing spells like Opt and Spell Pierce to control the game. Additionally, the deck includes burn spells like Burst Lightning for additional removal and direct damage. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through incremental advantage and control.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counterspells, removal, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also generating card advantage and tempo. It aims to stall the game with Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock, before eventually overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats like Hearth Elemental. The inclusion of cards like Opt, Prismari Charm, and Sleight of Hand allows for consistent card selection and filtering, while Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke provide additional disruption. The deck also includes burn spells like Burst Lightning for removal and finishers.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to flood the board with efficient threats like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also utilizes cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel to protect its creatures and ensure consistency in combat. With a mix of aggression and resilience, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a swarm of powerful creatures and maintain board presence throughout the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures that can quickly establish board presence and overwhelm the opponent with relentless aggression. By deploying efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, along with ramp from Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to consistently curve out and apply pressure early on. In addition, the deck utilizes various spells and enchantments like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve to buff up creatures and close out games quickly. Overall, this deck aims to win through fast, efficient beatdowns and maintaining tempo throughout the game.

The deck focuses on using cards that manipulate the graveyard and bring powerful creatures back into play for a devastating combo. Key cards include Deceit, Superior Spider-Man, and Emeritus of Ideation for graveyard manipulation, while Requiting Hex and Requiting Hex are used to bring back creatures from the graveyard. The deck also includes disruption cards like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff to control the opponent's hand. The mana base consists of lands that provide both black and blue mana for casting the deck's powerful spells.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm and outpace your opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Burst Lightning, you can quickly apply pressure to your opponent while also having control options with cards like Bounce Off and Deceit. The mana base includes a variety of lands to ensure you have the right colors available to cast your spells efficiently. This deck aims to be fast and relentless, putting your opponent on the back foot and closing out games quickly.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence by utilizing creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves. The deck also includes cards to support the creatures, such as Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently. Additionally, the deck includes some removal and utility spells like Erode and Royal Treatment to control the board and maintain pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on using graveyard recursion and powerful combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex, the player can quickly bring back key threats like Superior Spider-Man or Emeritus of Ideation. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Duress and Bitter Triumph to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of control elements and explosive reanimation, the deck aims to quickly assemble a lethal board state and close out the game before the opponent can react effectively.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bringing them back to the battlefield for a devastating combo. It uses cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to manipulate card draws and discard creatures, while utilizing Requiting Hex and Emeritus of Ideation to reanimate them. Duress and Bitter Triumph help control the opponent's hand and board state, while Winternight Stories and Day of Black Sun provide additional graveyard manipulation. The deck also includes various lands to provide mana fixing and support the combo strategy.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, supported by spells like Burst Lightning and Vibrant Outburst. The deck focuses on card draw and manipulation with Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Secret Identity to maintain pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of Stormchaser's Talent and Flow State provides added versatility and damage potential. The lands in the deck are designed to ensure a consistent mana base for a fast-paced aggressive strategy.

This deck focuses on controlling the board and manipulating your opponent's resources. It includes a variety of removal spells and artifacts to slow down your opponent, while also utilizing cards like Perilous Snare and United Battlefront to maintain board presence. The deck also includes card draw and mana ramp options to ensure you have the resources you need to outlast your opponent. The goal is to disrupt your opponent's game plan and outvalue them in the long run, utilizing a combination of artifact synergies and tactical plays.
